title: CockroachDB credentials should not be disclosed
description: CockroachDB is a distributed SQL database designed for cloud-native applications. CockroachDB Cloud credentials include API keys and connection strings. CockroachDB Serverless and Dedicated clusters store business-critical data that must be protected from unauthorized access.
recommendation: Remove CockroachDB credentials from source code. Use environment variables for connection strings. Rotate API keys at cockroachlabs.cloud/settings.
impact: Unauthorized access to distributed SQL databases containing application data and potential PII.

checks.message: CockroachDB Cloud connection string with embedded credentials detected. This PostgreSQL-compatible connection string contains credentials for a CockroachDB distributed database. Exposing this provides direct SQL access to all data in the cluster. Rotate the database user password immediately at cockroachlabs.cloud.
CockroachDB API key detected. CockroachDB Cloud API keys manage clusters, users, and backups. Rotate immediately at cockroachlabs.cloud/settings.
